svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="工程化基建优先级金字塔" id="overview"> <mxGraphModel dx="-514" dy="-193" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1169" pageHeight="826" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="t1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#2563eb;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="第 1 层：监控
投入 1 周｜立刻看见线上有没有事
→ 不做它，后面全是瞎的" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="520" x="160" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="第 2 层：自动化测试
投入 1 个月｜解除「不敢改代码」的阻塞
→ 没测试，重构 / 升级 / 新人碰代码全都不敢动" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="560" x="220" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="第 3 层：CI/CD 流水线（云效）
投入 2 周｜把前两步放大
→ 测试靠人跑一定会漏，监控探针靠流水线部署" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="600" x="260" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f1f5f9;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="第 4 层：敏捷协作（云效）
持续磨合｜让团队用起来前三步
→ 基建搭好没人按流程走，等于白搭" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="640" x="300" y="450" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontColor=#2563eb;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="先做（投入产出比最高）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="120" x="40" y="135" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;" value="后做（放大前层）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="100" x="40" y="465" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;" value="工程化基建优先级：越往下越早做" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="380" x="320" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;strokeColor=#94a3b8;dashed=1;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="80" y="540" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="80" y="140" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrowhead" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;strokeColor=#2563eb;fillColor=#2563eb;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="80" y="160" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="80" y="140" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 518px; height: 1px; padding-top: 100px; margin-left: 121px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
第 1 层：监控
投入 1 周｜立刻看见线上有没有事
→ 不做它，后面全是瞎的

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 558px; height: 1px; padding-top: 210px; margin-left: 181px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
第 2 层：自动化测试
投入 1 个月｜解除「不敢改代码」的阻塞
→ 没测试，重构 / 升级 / 新人碰代码全都不敢动

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(219, 234, 254), rgb(26, 39, 56)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
第 3 层：CI/CD 流水线（云效）
投入 2 周｜把前两步放大
→ 测试靠人跑一定会漏，监控探针靠流水线部署

div.div:
第 4 层：敏捷协作（云效）
持续磨合｜让团队用起来前三步
→ 基建搭好没人按流程走，等于白搭
